flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Cleveland State Community College fell 21% between 2006 and 2009 (15.4% → 12.2%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Cleveland State Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Cleveland State Community College fell 18% between 2017 and 2020 ($9.8k → $8.0k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Cleveland State Community College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 (46.5% → 51.9%).
